title: Customer Portal
summary: A customer-facing ordering portal architected to grow from hundreds to millions of requests.
body:
## The problem

Orders arrived by email and phone, and every one of them was retyped into the ERP by hand.

## What we built

A self-service portal where customers browse live inventory, place orders, and track deliveries — integrated directly with the existing ERP.

## Outcome

Order-entry errors disappeared, and the sales team's time moved from data entry to actual selling.
